task_completion.description: OpenToonz application is open and active
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The specified audio file is located and selected for import
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file browser (either OS-level or OpenToonz's internal browser) shows navigation to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/audio/' and the file 'reference_dialogue.wav' is selected, loaded, or being dragged into the scene.

task_completion.description: The audio file is imported as a Sound Column in the Xsheet
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Xsheet (or Timeline) panel in OpenToonz displays a column designated for sound, which can be identified by a speaker icon, an audio waveform, or the label 'reference_dialogue'.

task_completion.description: The scene is saved to the specified output path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Scene' or 'Save As' dialog is visible showing the target folder '/home/ga/OpenToonz/projects/audio_sync_scene/' and the file name 'audio_sync_scene.tnz', or the main OpenToonz window title bar updates to reflect the saved scene name 'audio_sync_scene.tnz'.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenToonz GUI to import the audio and save the scene
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show mouse clicks, drag-and-drop actions, or menu navigation within the OpenToonz interface rather than terminal commands executing the task.

integrity.description: The agent did not use the terminal to manually edit the .tnz scene file
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing text editors (like nano or vim) modifying the XML structure of the .tnz file directly.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual OpenToonz application
integrity.visual_evidence: The application being used has the distinct OpenToonz UI, including the Xsheet, standard toolbars, and room tabs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The audio file to import is located at '/home/ga/OpenToonz/audio/reference_dialogue.wav'. The scene must be saved exactly to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/projects/audio_sync_scene/audio_sync_scene.tnz'.
